ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "uk_size" INTEGER /* UK size of the clothing */,
  "bust_inch" REAL /* Bust measurement in inches */,
  "waist_inch" REAL /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "hips_inch" REAL /* Hips measurement in inches */,
  "bust_cm" REAL /* Bust measurement in centimeters */,
  "waist_cm" REAL /* Waist measurement in centimeters */,
  "hips_cm" REAL /* Hips measurement in centimeters */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the size was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the size */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the size is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "brand_description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the brand */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the brand */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the brand is based */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the brand's logo */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the brand is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Tops, Bottoms, Dresses) */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "recommended_fit" TEXT /* Recommended fit for the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the category is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_chart" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart entry */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand for which the size chart is created */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category for which the size chart is created */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the size chart is applicable */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the size chart is designed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the size chart entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the size chart entry */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the size chart entry is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, product manager, customer support) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password for security */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user account */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is currently active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object to store user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
